name: executing-plans
tagline: Orchestrates executing a written implementation plan task-by-task with review checkpoints and stop-and-ask failure handling.
verdict: Clean, low-risk process skill with strong stop conditions and clear integration points to sibling skills. Weak spots: 'report when complete' has no defined output shape, re-run safety for a partially-completed plan is only implicit, and there's no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: 'report when complete' is the only deliverable description; no format, location, or required sections.
No explicit skip-if-already-completed rule for a restarted run; relies implicitly on todo state.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
